Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.Rotation2D

  • Packages that use Rotation2D 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry
    This package contains classes to work with basic geometric entities such as 2D or 3D points, lines, planes, 2D or 3D triangles or polygons, circles, spheres, rotations, transformations etc.

    • Uses of Rotation2D in com.irurueta.geometry

      Fields in com.irurueta.geometry declared as Rotation2D 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private Rotation2D EuclideanTransformation2D.rotation
      2D rotation to be performed on geometric objects.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry that return Rotation2D 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Rotation2D Rotation2D.combineAndReturnNew​(Rotation2D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation with this rotation and returns the result as a new Rotation2D instance.
      Rotation2D AffineTransformation2D.getRotation()
      Returns 2D rotation assigned to this transformation.
      Rotation2D Ellipse.getRotation()
      Gets 2D rotation.
      Rotation2D EuclideanTransformation2D.getRotation()
      Returns 2D rotation assigned to this transformation.
      Rotation2D ProjectiveTransformation2D.getRotation()
      Returns the 2D rotation component associated to this transformation.
      Rotation2D Rotation2D.inverseRotation()
      Returns a 2D rotation which is inverse to this instance.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry with parameters of type Rotation2D 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void AffineTransformation2D.addRotation​(Rotation2D rotation)
      Adds provided rotation to current rotation assigned to this transformation.
      void EuclideanTransformation2D.addRotation​(Rotation2D rotation)
      Adds provided rotation to current rotation assigned to this transformation.
      void ProjectiveTransformation2D.addRotation​(Rotation2D rotation)
      Adds provided rotation to current rotation assigned to this transformation.
      void Rotation2D.combine​(Rotation2D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation into this rotation resulting in the sum of both rotations.
      static void Rotation2D.combine​(Rotation2D rot1, Rotation2D rot2, Rotation2D result)
      Combines the rotation of instances rot1 and rot1 into provided result instance.
      Rotation2D Rotation2D.combineAndReturnNew​(Rotation2D rotation)
      Combines provided rotation with this rotation and returns the result as a new Rotation2D instance.

      Determines if two Rotation2D instances are equal or not (i.e.
      boolean Rotation2D.equals​(Rotation2D other, double threshold)
      Determines if two Rotation2D instances are equal up to provided threshold or not (i.e.
      void Rotation2D.inverseRotation​(Rotation2D result)
      Sets into provided Rotation2D instance a rotation inverse to this instance.
      void Ellipse.setCenterAxesAndRotation​(Point2D center, double semiMajorAxis, double semiMinorAxis, Rotation2D rotation)
      Sets ellipse parameters.

      Sets 2D rotation for this transformation.

      Sets 2D rotation.

      Sets 2D rotation for this transformation.

      Sets 2D rotation for this transformation.
